title: Star Witch
description:
Star Witch is a dark fantasy action RPG where power comes at a cost. 
A mysterious witch has fallen from the sky, bringing with her an unnatural force that is reshaping the world. Kingdoms have collapsed, the dead rise again, and creatures once bound by nature now serve a darker will.

You begin with nothing—exploring ruined dungeons, scavenging gear, and growing stronger with every battle. Combat is immersive and physical, letting you wield weapons, cast magic, and survive encounters your own way. Every piece of equipment matters, appearing directly on your character and shaping how you fight.

Face twisted enemies, uncover hidden lore, and prepare for encounters with powerful witches who command ice, blood, and forbidden magic. Their strength defies the natural laws of the world—and defeating them will demand more than skill alone.

Explore a living world shaped by dynamic weather, dangerous environments, and the constant threat of something watching from the shadows. Whether you carve your path through dungeons or survive the chaos above ground, every step forward pulls you deeper into a world where magic breaks the rules.

Power demands a price. Will you survive long enough to pay it?
description_short: A dark fantasy action RPG where a fallen witch reshapes the world. Explore dangerous dungeons, fight twisted enemies, and grow stronger through immersive combat and powerful gear. Power demands a price.
